serviceNotes.engine oil: CBS oil service MFR 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum with Long-Life oil (SIB B000214 / service display); tri-turbo M550d row follows service display.
serviceNotes.micro filter: Interior filter at every engine oil change per garage.wiki F10/F18.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: Every 2 years for N57 table rows per garage.wiki F10/F18.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Air filter each second engine oil service (60,000 km) per garage.wiki F10/F18.
serviceNotes.fuel filter: Diesel fuel filter each second engine oil service (60,000 km) per garage.wiki F10/F18.
serviceNotes.timing chain: Chain-driven; monitor at very high mileage.
serviceNotes.EGR / intake clean: Six-cylinder diesel EGR/intake soot; ~120,000 km when needed.

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS intervals) — 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum. https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f10-f18/2012/service-intervals.html — N57 D30 B tri-turbo: service display
serviceSources.micro filter: https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f10-f18/2012/service-intervals.html — interior filter at every engine oil change
serviceSources.air cleaner element: https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f10-f18/2012/service-intervals.html — air filter with each second engine oil change (60,000 km)
serviceSources.fuel filter: https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f10-f18/2012/service-intervals.html — fuel filter with each second engine oil change (60,000 km)
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 30,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 30,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 — vehicle check every second engine oil service (60,000 km)
